verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How marvelous! How wonderful! and my song shall ever be How marvelous! How wonderful! is my Savior's love for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I stand amazed in the presence of Jesus the Nazarene. And wonder how He could love me, a sinner condemned, unclean

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He took my sins and my sorrows He made them His very own He bore the burden to Calvary And suffered and died alone.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When with ransomed in glory His face I at last shall see 'Twill be my joy through the ages to sing of His love of me.
